detail: Leave-one-run-out folds use disjoint run ids.

Main columns exclude run/event id, D_t, pair residuals, and absolute amplitude: ['q_b2', 'q_b4', 'q_b6', 'q_b8', 'q_mean', 'q_max', 'q_std', 'q_ds_mean', 'q_ds_max', 'q_ds_std', 'q_b2_minus_ds_mean', 'q_ds_span', 'peak_ds_mean', 'peak_ds_max', 'high_amp_boundary', 'near_adc_boundary']
Rows retained after train/heldout matched-stratum support.
Expected to remain strong if downstream waveform quality drives the label.
